text_block_list.text:
I already have a training regimen prepared for
Seiun Sky's next race, but...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
choice_data_list: Are you okay? What are you staring at?
Are you okay? What are you staring at?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, for our next strategy, how about
"Operation Cotton Candy"?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Come on, take a look at those snow-white clouds
floating up there in the blue sky...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
All soft and fluffy like cotton candy. Don't they
look delicious?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Imagine if they passed out cotton candy before a
race. Then we could all celebrate like it was a
festival... Yep, I'm losing it.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Now it's my head that's starting to go soft and
fluffy...

Sky is so exhausted she can't even think straight.
Looks like I'll need to rethink her schedule
moving forward.
